heading: Omitted
label: 486 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , which authorized prescription of regulations to carry out sections 484 to 486 of this title, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.act July 14, 1954, ch. 472, § 368 Stat. 468
